case_title: PHILIP J. PEREZ VS. MEDICAL HAIR RESTORATION, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-24-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEDICAL HAIR RESTORATION, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2009 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR FURTHER TRIAL TO JAN-15-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COURT FINDS THAT AT THIS TIME PLAINTIFF'S LAWSUIT IS PREMATURE AS THE DEFENDANT REPRESENTED THAT IT MAY TAKE UP TO 8 MONTHS FOR NEW HAIR TO GROW. IT WILL BE 8 MONTHS SINCE THE PROCEDURE ON DECEMBER 1, 2009. THEREFORE, THE COURT BELIEVES THAT IT WILL BE MORE APPROPRIATE TO EVALUATE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AFTER DECEMBER 1, 2009. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. (ALL EXHIBITS RETAINED IN COURT FILE)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2010 - CONTINUED TO MAR-04-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL A PHYSICAL EXAMINATION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL MAKE HIMSELF AVAILABLE FOR A 1/2 HOUR EXAMINATION BY A DOCTOR AFFILIATED WITH DEFENDANT NO LATER THEN FEBRUARY 19, 2010. TRIAL IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 4, 2010 AT 3:30 PM. BOTH PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED THAT JUDGE PRO TEM MCDONALD MAY HEAR THE CASE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MEDICAL HAIR RESTORATION TRIAL BRIEF AND EXHIBITS RECEIVED. SUBMITTED TO COURT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY MEDICAL HAIR RESTORATION, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, PHILIP J. AS TO DEFENDANT MEDICAL HAIR RESTORATION, INC. CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-04-2010 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY PEREZ, PHILIP J. AS TO DEFENDANT MEDICAL HAIR RESTORATION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY PEREZ, PHILIP J. MEDICAL HAIR RESTORATION, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-19-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD.
MEDICAL HAIR RESTORATION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL EXAMINATION, FILED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MEDICAL HAIR RESTORATION, INC.
